    Advanced Shot-On-The-Move mathematical solver ingested from Team 254 (2024).

    Standard utility class for mathematically clamping values, wrapping angles, and applying deadbands.

    TractionControlLimiter
    Advanced 2D Slew Rate Limiter to prevent carpet/tile slippage and odometry drift.

    Utility class for common unit conversions used in FTC robotics.
